title: New Queensland Government Labels Labor's Pumped Hydro Project a 'Hoax' After True Cost Revealed in Report
content: Queensland's new LNP government, led by Premier David Crisafulli, has scrapped Labor's Pioneer-Burdekin Pumped Hydro Project, citing a report revealing a true cost of $36 billionâ€”far higher than Laborâ€™s initial $12 billion estimate. The project was planned to generate 5,000 megawatts (MW) of power. Deputy Premier Jarrod Bleijie accused the previous Labor government of deceiving the public. The report suggested smaller, viable hydro options costing between $22 billion and $28.2 billion, but the LNP will instead explore smaller projects in different locations.
author: Analysts Account
